place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle.query: a worker places a ring-shaped part onto the central machine spindle
place_ring_part_on_machine_spindle.prompt:
Event: a worker places a ring-shaped part onto the central machine spindle
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
